learners.indexSubtitle: Watch progress, focus and at-risk students per lecture. All data is auto-deleted after graduation.
learners.noLectures: No published lectures yet. Create a lecture first.
learners.emptyRoster: No learners have started this lecture yet.
learners.searchAriaLabel: Search learners by name or student ID
learners.riskTooltipHigh: Below 30% progress, or no activity for 3+ days
learners.bulkPickPrompt: Pick learners in the table to enable bulk actions.
learners.bulkBackendPending: This action will be enabled when the backend endpoint ships.
learners.detailNotFound: No watch record for this learner.
learners.detailQaBackendPending: Per-learner Q&A filter activates once user_id is exposed by the backend.
learners.detailAssessmentBackendPending: Per-learner assessment scores ship when the backend endpoint is ready.
learners.privacyBullet1: Student data is used only for learning analytics — no advertising, no third-party sharing.
learners.privacyBullet2: Personal data is auto-deleted after the retention window expires (graduation / course end).
learners.privacyBullet3: Each instructor can only see learners enrolled in their own lectures.
learners.privacyMoreLink: Read the student data protection policy
learners.toastNotImplemented: Backend endpoint not ready yet. See BACKEND_ASKS.LEARNERS.md.
